calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for commencement of Trial De Novo.

Dept. 306; Judge Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:27:42 a.m. and concluding at 12:02:55 p.m.

Appellant/Defendant Huan Liu appearing in pro per and is placed under oath.
Respondents/Plaintiffs William Barbaro and Eric Herrmann appearing in pro per and is placed under oath.

Appellant/Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit A - Pipe Spy Plumbing Invoice
Exhibit B - Copy of Lease Agreement dated Feb-12-2021
Exhibit C - Letter dated Mar-30-2022
Exhibit D - Letter dated Aug-25-2022
Exhibit E - Utility Bills

Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Letter of Complaint Pertaining to Plumbing Issue
Exhibit 2 - Copy of Lease Agreement dated Feb-12-2021
Exhibit 3 - E-mail Thread about Move Out
Exhibit 4 - Screenshot of Text Messages re: Payment of Rent Board Verdict
Exhibit 5 - E-mail dated Apr-08-2023
Exhibit 6 - E-mail from Huan Liu to William Barbaro and Eric Herrmann about Water Bill

The matter is submitted.
Respondent/Plaintiff is awarded $1,000.00 plus $30.00 Costs for a total judgment in the sum of $1,030.00.

Appellant/Defendant's cross claim is DENIED.

Appellant/Defendant shall pay Respondents/Plaintiffs the sum of $1,030.00 by check via U.S. Mail by Aug-23-2023.
Judgment entered.

EXHIBITS RETURNED TO THE PARTIES IN OPEN COURT

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Set For Trial On Aug-02-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Continued To Aug-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Jun-07-23 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
